Poetic Kennings, never recursive stacking. Progressive Construction (*ic wæs gangende*). *Dōn* as periphrastic Auxiliary, the exact Cognate of German *tun*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       **Angelsaksisch / Oud-Engels:** Twee-Elementen Samenstellingen met transparante Naamvals relaties. Poetische Kenningen, nooit recursieve Stapeling. Progressieve Constructie (*ic wæs gangende*). *Dōn* als perifrastisch Hulp werkwoord, het exacte Cognaat van Duits *tun*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       **Angelsaksisk / Oldengelsk:** Toleddede Sammensaetninger med gennemsigtige Kasus Relationer. Poetiske Kenninger, aldrig rekursiv Stabling. Progressiv Konstruktion (*ic wæs gangende*). *Dōn* som perifrastisk Hjaeelpe Verbum, det praecise Kognat af Tysk *tun*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           **Anglo-Saxon / Oult English:** Tsvy-element Compounds mit transparent Case Relationships. Poetic Kennings, nie recursive Stacking. Progressive Construction (*ic wæs gangende*). *Dōn* als periphrastic Auxiliary, der exact Cognate von doitsch *tun*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             **Angelsächsisch / Altenglisch:** Zweigliedrige Komposita mit transparenten Kasusbeziehungen. Poetische Kenningar, nie rekursive Stapelung. Verlaufskonstruktion (*ic wæs gangende*). *Dōn* als periphrastisches Auxiliar, das exakte Kognat von Deutsch *tun*.
  **Modern English:** Compound decomposition → structurally identical noun phrases. Verb-second matches English word order. Do-support, progressive, prepositional possession, colloquial double negation: all shared.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        **Modern English:** Compound Decomposition → structurally identical Noun Phrases. Verb-second matches English Word Order. Do-support, progressive, prepositional Possession, colloquial double Negation: all shared.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         **Modern Engels:** Samenstellings ontleding → structureel identieke Naamwoord groepen. Werkwoord-tweede komt overeen met Engelse Woord volgorde. Doen-Steun, Progressief, Voorzetsel bezit, spreektaal dubbele Ontkenning: allemaal gedeeld.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        **Moderne Engelsk:** Sammensaetnings Dekomposition → strukturelt identiske Navne Syntagmer. Verbum-anden matcher engelsk Ordfoelge. Goere-Stoette, Progressiv, praepositionel Ejendom, dagligdags dobbelt Negation: alle delt.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                **Modern English:** Compound Decomposition → strukturell identical Noun Phrases. Verb-second matches English Word Order. Do-support, progressive, prepositional Possession, colloquial double Negation: alle shared.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 **Modernes Englisch:** Kompositazerlegung → strukturell identische Nominalphrasen. Verb-Zweit-Stellung entspricht englischer Wortstellung. *Tun*-Umschreibung, Verlaufsform, präpositionaler Besitzausdruck, umgangssprachliche doppelte Verneinung: alles geteilt.
  **Frisian:** Short, transparent compounds with live case/prepositional syntax. Collapsed to two genders. *Von*-restoration moves German toward Frisian/English analytic pattern.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            **Frisian:** Short, transparent Compounds with live case/prepositional Syntax. Collapsed to two Genders. *Von*-restoration moves German toward Frisian/English analytic Pattern.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             **Fries:** Korte, transparante Samenstellingen met levende Naamval/Voorzetsel syntaxis. Ingestort tot twee Geslachten. *Von*-Herstelling beweegt het Duits naar het Friese/Engelse analytische Patroon.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             **Frisisk:** Korte, gennemsigtige Sammensaetninger med levende Kasus/praepositionel Syntaks. Kollapset til to Koen. *Von*-Genskabelse bevaeger Tysk mod Frisisk/Engelsk analytisk Moenstre.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   **Frisian:** Short, transparent Compounds mit live Case/prepositional Syntax. Collapsed tsu tsvy Genders. *Von*-restoration moves Doitsch toward Frisian/English analytic Pattern.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   **Friesisch:** Kurze, transparente Komposita mit lebendiger Kasus-/Präpositionalsyntax. Auf zwei Genera zusammengefallen. *Von*-Wiederherstellung bewegt das Deutsche zum friesisch-englischen analytischen Muster hin.
  **Plautdietsch / Low German:** No HG consonant shift. Less aggressive compound stacking. Free *tun*-periphrasis. Double negation preserved. More flexible verb position in subordinate clauses.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             **Plautdietsch / Low German:** No HG Consonant Shift. Less aggressive Compound stacking. Free *tun*-periphrasis. Double Negation preserved. More flexible Verb Position in subordinate Clauses.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              **Plautdietsch / Laag-Duits:** Geen HD Klankverschuiving. Minder agressieve Samenstellings stapeling. Vrye *tun*-Perifrase. Dubbele Ontkenning bewaard. Flexibelere Werkwoord positie in Bysinnen.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  **Plautdietsch / Nedertysk:** Ingen HG Konsonant Forskydning. Mindre aggressiv Sammensaetnings Stabling. Fri *tun*-Perifrase. Dobbelt Negation bevaret. Mere fleksibel Verb Position i Bisaetninger.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          **Plautdietsch / Low Doitsch:** Kine HG Consonant Shift. Less aggressive Compound Stacking. Fry *tun*-periphrasis. Double Negation preserved. More flexible Verb Position in subordinate Clauses.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    **Plautdietsch / Niederdeutsch:** Keine HD-Konsonantenverschiebung. Weniger aggressive Kompositastapelung. Freie *tun*-Periphrase. Doppelte Verneinung bewahrt. Flexiblere Verbposition in Nebensätzen.
  **Dutch:** Compound decomposition toward Dutch norms. Progressive *aan het werken zijn* = *am Arbeiten sein*. *Van* for possession = *von*. Colloquial name articles *de Jan* = *der Hans*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 **Dutch:** Compound Decomposition toward Dutch Norms. Progressive *aan het werken zijn* = *am Arbeiten sein*. *Van* for Possession = *von*. Colloquial Name Articles *de Jan* = *der Hans*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  **Nederlands:** Samenstellings ontleding naar Nederlandse Normen. Progressief *aan het werken zine* = *am Arbeiten sein*. *Van* voor Bezit = *von*. Spreektaal Naam lidwoorden *de Jan* = *der Hans*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               **Nederlandsk:** Sammensaetnings Dekomposition mod nederlandske Normer. Progressiv *aan het werken zijn* = *am Arbeiten sein*. *Van* for Ejendom = *von*. Dagligdags Egennavn Artikler *de Jan* = *der Hans*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 **Dutch:** Compound Decomposition toward Dutch Norms. Progressive *aan het werken zijn* = *am Arbeiten sine*. *Van* fuer Possession = *von*. Colloquial Name Articles *de Jan* = *der Hans*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         **Niederländisch:** Kompositazerlegung in Richtung niederländischer Normen. Verlaufsform *aan het werken zijn* = *am Arbeiten sein*. *Van* für Besitz = *von*. Umgangssprachliche Namensartikel *de Jan* = *der Hans*.
  **Afrikaans:** Double negation (*Ek het nie geld nie*). Analytic possession (*se*, *van*). Shorter compounds. Afrikaans validates the thesis: a never-Latinized Germanic language already looks like Entfesselt output.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     **Afrikaans:** Double Negation (*Ek het nie geld nie*). Analytic Possession (*se*, *van*). Shorter Compounds. Afrikaans validates the Thesis: a never-Latinized Germanic Language already looks like Entfesselt Output.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      **Afrikaans:** Dubbele Ontkenning (*Ek het nie geld nie*). Analytisch Bezit (*se*, *van*). Kortere Samenstellingen. Het Afrikaans valideert de These: een nooit-gelatiniseerde Germaanse Taal ziet er al uit als Entfesselt Uitvoer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                **Afrikaans:** Dobbelt Negation (*Ek het nie geld nie*). Analytisk Ejendom (*se*, *van*). Kortere Sammensaetninger. Afrikaans validerer Tesen: et aldrig-latiniseret germansk Sprog ser allerede ud som Entfesselt Resultat.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  **Afrikaans:** Double Negation (*Ek het nie geld nie*). Analytic Possession (*se*, *van*). Shorter Compounds. Afrikaans validates die Thesis: eine nie-Latinized Germanic Sprache already looks like Entfesselt Output.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              **Afrikaans:** Doppelte Verneinung (*Ek het nie geld nie*). Analytischer Besitzausdruck (*se*, *van*). Kürzere Komposita. Afrikaans bestätigt die These: Eine nie latinisierte germanische Sprache sieht bereits wie Entfesselt-Ergebnis aus.
  **Danish / Norwegian / Swedish:** Compound length normalization (rarely \>3-4 elements). Progressive constructions. Flexible subordinate clause verb position.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              **Danish / Norwegian / Swedish:** Compound Length Normalization (rarely \>3-4 Elements). Progressive Constructions. Flexible subordinate Clause Verb Position.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               **Deens / Noors / Zweeds:** Samenstellings lengte normalisatie (zelden \>3-4 Elementen). Progressieve Constructies. Flexibele Werkwoord positie in Bysinnen.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        **Dansk / Norsk / Svensk:** Sammensaetnings Laengde Normalisering (sjaeeldent \>3-4 Elementer). Progressive Konstruktioner. Fleksibel Bisaetnings Verb Position.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              **Danish / Norwegian / Swedish:** Compound Length Normalization (rarely \>3-4 Elements). Progressive Constructions. Flexible subordinate Clause Verb Position.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       **Dänisch / Norwegisch / Schwedisch:** Normalisierung der Kompositalänge (selten \>3--4 Glieder). Verlaufskonstruktionen. Flexible Nebensatz-Verbposition.
  **Icelandic:** Same case system inside and outside compounds. Overwhelmingly two-element compounds. Entfesselt\'s fossil-first principle preserves archaic forms *closer to Icelandic\'s living case system* than Modern German\'s phrasal syntax.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          **Icelandic:** Same Case System inside and outside Compounds. Overwhelmingly two-element Compounds. Entfesselt\'s fossil-first Principle preserves archaic Forms *closer to Icelandic\'s living Case System* than Modern German\'s phrasal Syntax.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           **Yslands:** Hetzelfde Naamvals systeem binnen en buiten Samenstellingen. Overweldigend twee-Elementen Samenstellingen. Het Fossiel-eerst Principe van Entfesselt bewaart archaische Vormen dat *dichter by het levende Naamvals systeem van het Yslands* staan dan de Zins syntaxis van het Moderne Duits.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         **Islandsk:** Samme Kasus System inde i og uden for Sammensaetninger. Overvejende toleddede Sammensaetninger. Entfesselts Fossil-Foerst Princip bevarer arkaiske Former *taettere paa Islandskens levende Kasus System* end Moderne Tysks Syntagme Syntaks.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   **Icelandic:** Same Case System inside und outside Compounds. Overwhelmingly tsvy-element Compounds. Entfesselts fossil-first Principle preserves archaic Forms *closer tsu Icelandics living Case System* than Modern Doitschs phrasal Syntax.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      **Isländisch:** Dasselbe Kasussystem innerhalb und außerhalb von Komposita. Überwältigend zweigliedrige Komposita. Entfesselts Fossil-zuerst-Prinzip bewahrt archaische Formen, die *dem lebendigen Kasussystem des Isländischen näher* sind als die phrasale Syntax des modernen Deutsch.
  **Gothic (the deepest anchor):** Bishop Wulfila\'s (c. 311--383) 4th-century Bible translation is the oldest substantial Germanic text, and a critical test case for the Entfesselt thesis.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 **Gothic (the deepest Anchor):** Bishop Wulfila\'s (c. 311--383) 4th-century Bible Translation is the oldest substantial Germanic Text, and a critical Test Case for the Entfesselt Thesis.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  **Gotisch (het diepste Anker):** De vierde-eeuwse Bybel vertaling van Bisschop Wulfila (ca. 311--383) is de oudste substantiele Germaanse Tekst, en een kritisch Test geval voor de Entfesselt These.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               **Gotisk (det dybeste Anker):** Biskop Wulfilas (ca. 311--383) Bibeloversaettelse fra det 4. Aarhundrede er den aeldste substantielle germanske Tekst, og et kritisk Test Tilfaelde for Entfesselt Tesen.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     **Gothic (der deepest Anchor):** Bishop Wulfilas (c. 311--383) 4th-century Bible Translation ist der oldest substantial Germanic Text, und eine critical Test Case fuer die Entfesselt Thesis.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       **Gotisch (der tiefste Anker):** Bischof Wulfilas (ca. 311--383) Bibelübersetzung aus dem 4. Jahrhundert ist der älteste umfangreiche germanische Text und ein kritischer Testfall für die Entfesselt-These.
  **Contact influences, and what they did NOT do:** Gothic was written in the eastern Roman Empire, among Greek-speaking populations, by a bilingual bishop translating from Greek. The Goths had centuries of contact with Latin-speaking Rome (military, trade, administration) and with Slavic peoples in the Black Sea region. These contacts left clear traces: Greek loanwords flooded Gothic religious vocabulary (*aikklesjo* from ἐκκλησία, *aiwaggeljo* from εὐαγγέλιον, *apaustaulus* from ἀπόστολος). Latin contributed military and commercial terms (*wein* from *vinum*, *lukarn* from *lucerna*). Wulfila occasionally calqued Greek syntactic patterns in translation, and his alphabet was modeled on Greek letters. Slavic contact produced scattered lexical borrowings in both directions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               **Contact Influences, and what they did NOT do:** Gothic was written in the eastern Roman Empire, among Greek-speaking Populations, by a bilingual Bishop translating from Greek. The Goths had Centuries of Contact with Latin-speaking Rome (military, Trade, Administration) and with Slavic Peoples in the Black Sea Region. These Contacts left clear Traces: Greek Loanwords flooded Gothic religious Vocabulary (*aikklesjo* from ἐκκλησία, *aiwaggeljo* from εὐαγγέλιον, *apaustaulus* from ἀπόστολος). Latin contributed military and commercial Terms (*wein* from *vinum*, *lukarn* from *lucerna*). Wulfila occasionally calqued Greek syntactic Patterns in Translation, and his Alphabet was modeled on Greek Letters. Slavic Contact produced scattered lexical Borrowings in both Directions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                **Contact invloeden, en wat zy NIET deden:** Het Gotisch is geschreven in het Oost-Romeinse Ryk, temidden van Griekstalige Bevolkingen, door een tweetalige Bisschop dat vertaalde vanuit het Grieks. De Goten hadden Eeuwen van Contact met Latynstalig Rome (militair, Handel, Bestuur) en met Slavische Volken in de Zwarte Zee regio. Deze Contacten lieten duidelyke Sporen na: Griekse Leenwoorden overspoelden het Gotische religieuze Vocabulaire (*aikklesjo* van ἐκκλησία, *aiwaggeljo* van εὐαγγέλιον, *apaustaulus* van ἀπόστολος). Het Latyn droeg militaire en commerciele Termen by (*wein* van *vinum*, *lukarn* van *lucerna*). Wulfila kopieerde af en toe Griekse syntactische Patronen in Vertaling, en zyne Alfabet was gemodelleerd naar Griekse Letters. Slavisch Contact produceerde verspreide lexicale Ontleningen in beide Richtingen.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   **Kontakt Indflydelser, og hvad de IKKE gjorde:** Gotisk blev skrevet i det oestlige Romerrige, blandt graesk-talende Befolkninger, af en tosproget Biskop der oversatte fra Graesk. Goterne havde Aarhundreders Kontakt med latinsktaalende Rom (Militaer, Handel, Administration) og med slaviske Folk i Sort Havs Regionen. Disse Kontakter efterlod tydelige Spor: graeske Laaneord oversvoemte gotisk religioes Ordforraad (*aikklesjo* fra ἐκκλησία, *aiwaggeljo* fra εὐαγγέλιον, *apaustaulus* fra ἀπόστολος). Latin bidrog med militaere og kommercielle Termer (*wein* fra *vinum*, *lukarn* fra *lucerna*). Wulfila kalkerede lejlighedsvist graeske syntaktiske Moenstre i Oversaettelse, og hans Alfabet var modelleret paa graeske Bogstaver. Slavisk Kontakt producerede spredte leksikalske Laan i begge Retninger.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            **Contact Influences, und was sie did NOT tun:** Gothic war written in dem eastern Roman Empire, among Greek-speaking Populations, by einem bilingual Bishop translating von Greek. Die Goths had Jahrhunderte von Contact mit Latin-speaking Rome (military, trade, administration) und mit Slavic Peoples in der Black Sea Region. Diese Contacts left clear Traces: Greek Loanwords flooded Gothic religious Vocabulary (*aikklesjo* von ἐκκλησία, *aiwaggeljo* von εὐαγγέλιον, *apaustaulus* von ἀπόστολος). Latin contributed military und commercial Terms (*wein* von *vinum*, *lukarn* von *lucerna*). Wulfila occasionally calqued Greek syntactic Patterns in Translation, und his Alphabet war modeled on Greek Letters. Slavic Contact produced scattered lexical Borrowings in both Directions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         **Kontakteinflüsse, und was sie NICHT bewirkten:** Gotisch wurde im östlichen Römischen Reich geschrieben, unter griechischsprachigen Bevölkerungen, von einem zweisprachigen Bischof, der aus dem Griechischen übersetzte. Die Goten hatten Jahrhunderte des Kontakts mit dem lateinischsprachigen Rom (Militär, Handel, Verwaltung) und mit slawischen Völkern in der Schwarzmeerregion. Diese Kontakte hinterließen deutliche Spuren: Griechische Lehnwörter überfluteten den gotischen religiösen Wortschatz (*aikklesjo* von ἐκκλησία, *aiwaggeljo* von εὐαγγέλιον, *apaustaulus* von ἀπόστολος). Latein steuerte militärische und kommerzielle Begriffe bei (*wein* von *vinum*, *lukarn* von *lucerna*). Wulfila übersetzte gelegentlich griechische syntaktische Muster als Lehnübersetzungen, und sein Alphabet wurde nach griechischen Buchstaben modelliert. Slawischer Kontakt erzeugte vereinzelte lexikalische Entlehnungen in beiden Richtungen.
  The structural point: **none of these contacts altered Gothic\'s core grammatical structure.** Despite being saturated in Greek and Latin for generations, Gothic retained strictly two-element compounds with transparent case morphology (*þiudans*, king of the people; Gothic \*þiuda\* = \"people/nation,\" cognate with German \*Deutsch\*, English \*Dutch\*, Latin \*Teutonicus\*; \*-ns\* = nominative singular; the word survives directly as J.R.R. Tolkien\'s \"Théoden,\" King of Rohan in *The Lord of the Rings*; Tolkien was a philologist of Old English and Germanic languages who built the Rohirrim as a deliberate Anglo-Saxon/steppe cavalry culture and drew their king\'s title from exactly this Gothic/Old English root; that a 4th-century Gothic word passes into 20th-century fiction without translation demonstrates the family\'s structural coherence across sixteen centuries). No recursive stacking. Flexible verb position. Reinforcing double negation (*ni\...ni*). Full productive case system at compound joints identical to phrasal syntax. Gothic proves that contact with prestige languages does not automatically restructure Germanic grammar; it takes *deliberate prescriptive intervention* of the kind Gottsched and Adelung imposed a millennium and a half later. The Goths borrowed Greek words freely; they did not remodel their syntax to match Aristotle. German prescriptivists did exactly that with Cicero.   The structural Point: **none of these Contacts altered Gothic\'s core grammatical Structure.** Despite being saturated in Greek and Latin for Generations, Gothic retained strictly two-element Compounds with transparent Case Morphology (*þiudans*, king of the people; Gothic \*þiuda\* = \"people/nation,\" cognate with German \*Deutsch\*, English \*Dutch\*, Latin \*Teutonicus\*; \*-ns\* = nominative singular; the Word survives directly as J.R.R. Tolkien\'s \"Théoden,\" King of Rohan in *The Lord of the Rings*; Tolkien was a Philologist of Old English and Germanic Languages whom built the Rohirrim as a deliberate Anglo-Saxon/steppe Cavalry Culture and drew their King\'s Title from exactly this Gothic/Old English Root; that a 4th-century Gothic Word passes into 20th-century Fiction without Translation demonstrates the Family\'s structural Coherence across sixteen Centuries). No recursive stacking. Flexible Verb Position. Reinforcing double Negation (*ni\...ni*). Full productive Case System at Compound Joints identical to phrasal Syntax. Gothic proves that Contact with Prestige Languages does not automatically restructure Germanic Grammar; it takes *deliberate prescriptive Intervention* of the kind Gottsched and Adelung imposed a Millennium and a half later. The Goths borrowed Greek Words freely; they did not remodel their Syntax to match Aristotle. German Prescriptivists did exactly that with Cicero.   Het structurele Punt: **geen van deze Contacten veranderde de kern grammaticale Structuur van het Gotisch.** Ondanks dat het Generaties lang doordrenkt was van Grieks en Latyn, behield het Gotisch strikt twee-Elementen Samenstellingen met transparante Naamvals morfologie (*þiudans*, Koning van het Volk; Gotisch \*þiuda\* = \"Volk/Natie,\" cognaat met Duits \*Deutsch\*, Engels \*Dutch\*, Latyn \*Teutonicus\*; \*-ns\* = Nominatief Enkelvoud; het Woord overleeft direct als J.R.R. Tolkiens \"Théoden,\" Koning van Rohan in *The Lord of the Rings*; Tolkien was een Filoloog van het Oud-Engels en Germaanse Talen dat de Rohirrim bouwde als een opzettelyke Angelsaksische/Steppe Cavalerie cultuur en de Titel van hun Koning trok uit precies deze Gotische/Oud-Engelse Wortel; dat een vierde-eeuws Gotisch Woord de twintigste-eeuwse Fictie binnenkomt zonder Vertaling demonstreert de structurele Coherentie van de Familie over zestien Eeuwen). Geen recursieve Stapeling. Flexibele Werkwoord positie. Versterkende dubbele Ontkenning (*ni\...ni*). Volledig productief Naamvals systeem by Samenstellings voegen identiek aan Zins syntaxis. Het Gotisch bewyst dat Contact met Prestige talen niet automatisch de Germaanse Grammatica herstructureert; er is *opzettelyke prescriptieve Interventie* nodig van het Soort dat Gottsched en Adelung anderhalf Millennium later oplegden. De Goten ontleenden vryelyk Griekse Woorden; zy modelleerden hun Syntaxis niet naar Aristoteles om. Duitse Prescriptivisten deden precies dat met Cicero.   Det strukturelle Pointe: **ingen af disse Kontakter aendrede Gotiskens Kerne grammatiske Struktur.** Trods at vaere maettet med Graesk og Latin i Generationer bevarede Gotisk strengt toleddede Sammensaetninger med gennemsigtig Kasus Morfologi (*þiudans*, Folkenes Konge; Gotisk \*þiuda\* = \"Folk/Nation,\" kognat med Tysk \*Deutsch\*, Engelsk \*Dutch\*, Latin \*Teutonicus\*; \*-ns\* = Nominativ Ental; Ordet overlever direkte som J.R.R. Tolkiens \"Théoden,\" Rohans Konge i *Ringenes Herre*; Tolkien var Filolog i Oldengelsk og germanske Sprog der byggede Rohirrim som en bevidst angelsaksisk/Steppe Rytter Kultur og hentede deres Konges Titel fra netop denne gotiske/oldengelske Rod; at et gotisk Ord fra det 4. Aarhundrede gaar ind i Fiktion fra det 20. Aarhundrede uden Oversaettelse demonstrerer Familiens strukturelle Sammenhaeng paa tvaers af seksten Aarhundreder). Ingen rekursiv Stabling. Fleksibel Verb Position. Forstaeerkende dobbelt Negation (*ni\...ni*). Fuldt produktivt Kasus System ved Sammensaetnings Fuger identisk med Syntagme Syntaks. Gotisk beviser at Kontakt med Prestige Sprog ikke automatisk omstrukturerer germansk Grammatik; det kraever *bevidst praeskriptiv Intervention* af den Slags Gottsched og Adelung paalagde halvandet Aartusinde senere. Goterne laante graeske Ord frit; de ommodellerede ikke sin Syntaks til at matche Aristoteles. Tyske Praeskriptivister gjorde netop det med Cicero.
