+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Change 1: silent consonants rationalized only where a centroid cognate shows the consonant active.** The governing test: does at least one living centroid language (Dutch, German, Frisian, a Scandinavian language) still pronounce the consonant in the cognate word? If yes, the English spelling is rationalized to make the relationship visible. If no centroid language retains it, the silent consonant is left exactly as English has it --- the silence is then pan-Germanic, not an English-specific drift, and there is nothing to restore.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | **Change 1: silent Consonants rationalized only where a Centroid Cognate shows the Consonant active.** The governing Test: does at least one living Centroid Language (Dutch, German, Frisian, a Scandinavian Language) still pronounce the Consonant in the cognate Word? If yes, the English Spelling is rationalized to make the Relationship visible. If no Centroid Language retains it, the silent Consonant is left exactly as English has it --- the Silence is then pan-Germanic, not an English-specific Drift, and there is nothini to restore.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | **Verandering 1: stomme Medeklinkers gerationaliseerd alleen waar een Zwaartepunt cognaat de Medeklinker actief toont.** De bepalende Toets: spreekt ten minste een levende Taal van het Zwaartepunt (Nederlands, Duits, Fries, een Scandinavische Taal) de Medeklinker nog uit in het cognate Woord? Zo ja, dan wordt de Engelse Spelling gerationaliseerd om de Relatie zichtbaar te doen maken. Als geen Taal van het Zwaartepunt het behoudt, wordt de stomme Medeklinker exact gelaten zoals het Engels het heeft --- de Stilte is dan pan-Germaans, geen Engels-specifieke Drift, en er is niks te herstellen.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | **Forandring 1: stumme Konsonanter rationaliseres kun hvor et Centroid Kognat viser Konsonanten aktiv.** Den styrende Test: udtaler mindst ét levende Centroid Sprog (Nederlandsk, Tysk, Frisisk, et skandinavisk Sprog) stadig Konsonanten i Kognat Ordet? Hvis ja, rationaliseres den engelske Stavning for at goere Relationen synlig. Hvis intet Centroid Sprog bevarer den, efterlades den stumme Konsonant praecis som Engelsk har den --- Stilheden er da pangermansk, ikke en engelskspecifik Drift, og der er intet at genskabe.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | **Aenderung 1: stumme Konsonanten rationalisiert nur, wo ein centroid Kognat den Konsonant aktiv tsoigt.** Der governing Test: tut mindestens eine lebende centroid Sprache (Niederlaendisch, Deutsch, Friesisch, eine Skandinavische Sprache) den Konsonant noch aussprechen in dem Kognat Wort? Wenn ja, die englische Spelling wird rationalisiert, um die Relationen sichtbar tsu machen. Wenn kine centroid Sprache es retainiert, der stumme Konsonant wird genai gelassen, wie Englisch ihn hat --- die Stille ist dann pan-germanisch, nicht ein englisch-spetsifischer Drift, und es ist nichts tsu restorieren.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | **Änderung 1: Stumme Konsonanten rationalisiert, nur wo ein Zentroid-Kognat den Konsonanten aktiv zeigt.** Der maßgebliche Test: Spricht mindestens eine lebende Zentroid-Sprache (Niederländisch, Deutsch, Friesisch, eine skandinavische Sprache) den Konsonanten im Kognaten noch aus? Wenn ja, wird die englische Schreibung rationalisiert, um die Beziehung sichtbar zu machen. Wenn keine Zentroid-Sprache ihn beibehält, bleibt der stumme Konsonant genau so, wie Englisch ihn hat --- die Stummheit ist dann gesamtgermanisch, keine englische Einzeldrift, und es gibt nichts wiederherzustellen.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| *-ght → -ht*. The \"gh\" in *night/light/right/might/fight* was the fricative /x/, still written and pronounced as \"ch\" in German *Nacht/Licht/recht/Macht/Fecht-* and Dutch *nacht/licht/recht/macht/vecht-*. The \"g\" is dropped; the \"h\" remains. Pronunciation does not change.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | *-ght → -ht*. The \"gh\" in *niht/liht/riht/miht/fiht* was the fricative /x/, still written and pronounced as \"ch\" in German *Nacht/Licht/recht/Macht/Fecht-* and Dutch *nacht/licht/recht/macht/vecht-*. The \"g\" is dropped; the \"h\" remains. Pronunciation does not change.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | *-ght → -ht*. De \"gh\" in *night/light/right/might/fight* was de Fricatief /x/, nog steeds geschreven en uitgesproken als \"ch\" in Duits *Nacht/Licht/recht/Macht/Fecht-* en Nederlands *nacht/licht/recht/macht/vecht-*. De \"g\" wordt weggelaten; de \"h\" blyft. Uitspraak verandert niet.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | *-ght → -ht*. \"Gh\" i *night/light/right/might/fight* var Frikativen /x/, stadig skrevet og udtalt som \"ch\" i Tysk *Nacht/Licht/recht/Macht/Fecht-* og Nederlandsk *nacht/licht/recht/macht/vecht-*. \"G\" udelades; \"h\" forbliver. Udtale forandres ikke.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | *-ght → -ht*. Das \"gh\" in *niht/liht/riht/miht/fiht* ist der Frikativ /x/ gewesen, noch geschrieben und ausgesprochen als \"ch\" in Deutsch *Nacht/Licht/recht/Macht/Fecht-* und Niederlaendisch *nacht/licht/recht/macht/vecht-*. Das \"g\" wird gedroppt; das \"h\" bleibt. Aussprache aendert sich nicht.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | *-ght → -ht*. Das „gh\" in *night/light/right/might/fight* war der Frikativ /x/, der im Deutschen als „ch\" noch geschrieben und ausgesprochen wird: *Nacht/Licht/recht/Macht/Fecht-*, und im Niederländischen *nacht/licht/recht/macht/vecht-*. Das „g\" wird gestrichen; das „h\" bleibt. Die Aussprache ändert sich nicht.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

| *kn- restored in spelling.* The \"k\" in *knight/knee/knife/kneel* was pronounced in Old English and is still pronounced in Dutch *knecht/knie/knijf/knielen* and German *Knecht/Knie/Kniff/knien*. The \"k\" is written and treated as sounded.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | *kn- restored in Spelling.* The \"k\" in *kniht/knie/knif/kniel* was pronounced in Old English and is still pronounced in Dutch *knecht/knie/knijf/knielen* and German *Knecht/Knie/Kniff/knien*. The \"k\" is written and treated as sounded.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | *kn- hersteld in de Spelling.* De \"k\" in *knight/knee/knife/kneel* werd uitgesproken in het Oud-Engels en wordt nog steeds uitgesproken in Nederlands *knecht/knie/knijf/knielen* en Duits *Knecht/Knie/Kniff/knien*. De \"k\" wordt geschreven en als uitgesproken behandeld.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | *kn- genskabes i Stavning.* \"K\" i *knight/knee/knife/kneel* blev udtalt i Oldengelsk og udtales stadig i Nederlandsk *knecht/knie/knijf/knielen* og Tysk *Knecht/Knie/Kniff/knien*. \"K\" skrives og behandles som udtalt.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | *kn- restoriert in Spelling.* Das \"k\" in *kniht/knie/knif/kniel* ist in Old Englisch ausgesprochen gewesen und wird noch ausgesprochen in Niederlaendisch *knecht/knie/knijf/knielen* und Deutsch *Knecht/Knie/Kniff/knien*. Das \"k\" wird geschrieben und behandelt als sounded.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | *kn- in der Schreibung wiederhergestellt.* Das „k\" in *knight/knee/knife/kneel* wurde im Altenglischen ausgesprochen und wird im Niederländischen *knecht/knie/knijf/knielen* und Deutschen *Knecht/Knie/Kniff/knien* noch ausgesprochen. Das „k\" wird geschrieben und als gesprochen behandelt.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| *knight → kniht* · *knee → knie* · *knife → knif* | *Counterexample --- left alone.* English \"lamb\" has a silent \"b.\" German *Lamm* and Dutch *lam* have no \"b.\" No centroid language shows it active; the silent \"b\" stays. Similarly \"wrap/write\" (silent w-): Dutch *wrijven* retains the w in some cognates, but the specific English silent-w cluster needs case-by-case review with a native speaker before any change is made.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | *Counterexample --- left alone.* English \"lamb\" has a silent \"b.\" German *Lamm* and Dutch *lam* have no \"b.\" No Centroid Language shows it active; the silent \"b\" stays. Similarly \"wrap/write\" (silent w-): Dutch *wrijven* retains the w in some Cognates, but the specific English silent-w Cluster needs case-by-case Review with a native Speaker before any Change is made.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | *Tegenvoorbeeld --- ongewyzig gelaten.* Engels \"lamb\" heeft een stomme \"b.\" Duits *Lamm* en Nederlands *lam* hebben geen \"b.\" Geen Taal van het Zwaartepunt toont het actief; de stomme \"b\" blyft. Evenzo \"wrap/write\" (stomme w-): Nederlands *wrijven* behoudt de w in sommige Cognaten, maar het specifieke Engelse stomme-w Cluster moet Geval voor Geval beoordeeld worden met een Moedertaal spreker voordat enige Verandering gedaan wordt.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | *Modeksempel --- lades urort.* Engelsk \"lamb\" har et stumt \"b.\" Tysk *Lamm* og Nederlandsk *lam* har intet \"b.\" Intet Centroid Sprog viser det aktivt; det stumme \"b\" forbliver. Tilsvarende \"wrap/write\" (stumt w-): Nederlandsk *wrijven* bevarer w i visse Kognater, men den specifikke engelske stumme-w Klynge behoever Tilfaelde-for-Tilfaelde Gennemgang med en indfoede Taler foer nogen Forandring foretages.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | *Gegenbeispiel --- gelassen alleine.* Englisch \"lamb\" hat ein stummes \"b.\" Deutsch *Lamm* und Niederlaendisch *lam* haben kein \"b.\" Kine centroid Sprache tsoigt es aktiv; das stumme \"b\" bleibt. Similarly \"wrap/write\" (stummes w-): Niederlaendisch *wrijven* retainiert das w in einigen Kognaten, aber das spetsifische englische stumme-w Cluster braucht Fall-by-Fall Review mit einem nativen Speaker, bevor irgend eine Aenderung wird gemacht.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | *Gegenbeispiel --- unverändert belassen.* Englisch „lamb\" hat ein stummes „b\". Deutsch *Lamm* und Niederländisch *lam* haben kein „b\". Keine Zentroid-Sprache zeigt es aktiv; das stumme „b\" bleibt. Ebenso „wrap/write\" (stummes w-): Niederländisch *wrijven* behält das w in einigen Kognaten, aber der spezifische englische Stumm-w-Cluster erfordert eine Einzelfallprüfung mit einem Muttersprachler, bevor Änderungen vorgenommen werden.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Change 2: Noun Capitalization.** All languages in the Entfesselt system capitalize nouns. English is no exception: Early Modern English did capitalize nouns; the practice faded in the 18th century at the same moment German was codifying it as obligatory. Restoring it costs nothing phonologically and makes the centroid family immediately visible on the page.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | **Change 2: Noun Capitalization.** All Languages in the Entfesselt System capitalize Nouns. English is no Exception: Early Modern English did capitalize Nouns; the Practice faded in the 18th Century at the same Moment German was codifying it as obligatory. Restoring it costs nothini phonologically and makes the Centroid Family immediately visible on the Page.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | **Verandering 2: Zelfstandig naamwoord Kapitalisatie.** Alle Talen in het Entfesselt Systeem kapitaliseren Zelfstandige naamwoorden. Het Engels is geen Uitzondering: het vroeg-moderne Engels kapitaliseerde wel Zelfstandige naamwoorden; de Praktyk verdween in de achttiende Eeuw op hetzelfde Moment dat het Duits het als verplicht codificeerde. Het herstellen ervan kost fonologisch niks en maakt de Familie van het Zwaartepunt onmiddellyk zichtbaar op de Pagina.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | **Forandring 2: Navneords Stort Forbogstav.** Alle Sprog i Entfesselt Systemet skriver Navneord med stort. Engelsk er ingen Undtagelse: Tidligt Moderne Engelsk skrev Navneord med stort; Praksis falmede i det 18. Aarhundrede paa det samme Oejeblik Tysk var ved at kodificere det som obligatorisk. At genskabe det koster intet fonologisk og goer Centroid Familien umiddelbart synlig paa Siden.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | **Aenderung 2: Noun Kapitalisation.** Alle Sprachen in dem Entfesselt System kapitalisieren Nouns. Englisch ist kine Ausnahme: Early Modern Englisch hat Nouns kapitalisiert; die Praxis ist in dem 18. Jahrhundert verblasst by dem selben Moment, wo Deutsch es als obligatorisch kodifitsiert hat. Das Restorieren kostet nichts phonologisch und macht die centroid Familie immediately sichtbar ouf der Seite.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | **Änderung 2: Substantivgroßschreibung.** Alle Sprachen im Entfesselt-System schreiben Substantive groß. Englisch ist keine Ausnahme: Das Frühneuenglische schrieb Substantive groß; die Praxis verblasste im 18. Jahrhundert, im selben Moment, als das Deutsche sie als obligatorisch kodifizierte. Ihre Wiederherstellung kostet phonologisch nichts und macht die Zentroid-Familie sofort auf der Seite sichtbar.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

| The vowels are untouched; only the silent letters are rationalized and the Nouns are marked. A Dutch or German speaker immediately sees *Kniht / Knecht / knecht* and *Moon-liht / Mondlicht / maanlicht* as the same Words through the same spelling logic.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | The Vowels are untouched; only the silent Letters are rationalized and the Nouns are marked. Een Nederlandse of Duitse Spreker ziet onmiddellyk *Kniht / Knecht / knecht* en *Moon-liht / Mondlicht / maanlicht* als dezelfde Woorden door dezelfde Spellings logica.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Vokalerne er uroerte; kun de stumme Bogstaver er rationaliserede og Navneordene er markerede. Ein Niederlaendisch oder Deutsch Speaker sieht immediately *Kniht / Knecht / knecht* und *Moon-liht / Mond-Licht / maan-licht* als die selben Words durch die selbe Spelling Logic.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Die Vokale sind unberührt; nur die stummen Buchstaben werden rationalisiert und die Substantive markiert. Ein niederländischer oder deutscher Sprecher sieht sofort *Kniht / Knecht / knecht* und *Moon-liht / Mondlicht / maanlicht* als dieselben Wörter durch dieselbe Schreiblogik.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
